Lawn Game Rentals in Halifax NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals provides lawn game rentals for backyard birthdays, school events, festivals, and community gatherings in Halifax, Nova Scotia. Choose from 12 games including Cornhole, Giant Jenga, Giant Connect 4, Ladder Toss, Bocce Ball, Spikeball, and more. Halifax is Nova Scotia's capital and largest city, with year-round events from corporate functions to backyard birthday parties.

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. Approximately 100 km from Bridgewater. Travel quoted. Travel fee applies after the first 15 km from Bridgewater ($0.72/km). Final travel cost confirmed with your quote.

Featured Rentals

  • Crown Island Combo - Combo Inflatable, By quote, Wet-use - Tropical combo with bounce, slide, and splash/pool fun.

Best For

  • Backyard parties
  • School events
  • Community events
  • Festivals

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you rent lawn games in Halifax?
Yes. Nova Kingdom Rentals delivers lawn game packages to Halifax, Nova Scotia. Approximately 100 km from Bridgewater. Travel quoted. Contact us to confirm availability and travel cost.
How much do lawn game packages cost?
5 Lawn Games: $175. 10 Lawn Games: $250. All 12 Lawn Games (includes Cornhole): $280. Cornhole add-on available with 5 or 10 game selections for +$25.
Can I add lawn games to an inflatable rental?
Yes. Lawn games can be added to any inflatable or package rental depending on availability. Ask about combination pricing when you submit your request.
What lawn games are most popular for birthdays and community events?
Cornhole, Giant Jenga, and Giant Connect 4 are consistently the most popular choices. Bocce Ball, Spikeball, Ladder Toss, and Badminton work great for events with more space or older guests.
